sourceContext.originPage: capability / practice-area page - Related capabilities band

contentPattern.structure: wrap of pill/tag links (one link per item)

suitableFor: tag / category link clusters on a dark accent band
any wrap of small link pills that jump to related pages
notSuitableFor: card rows with images or descriptions (use cards-insights)
text promo cards with eyebrow + headline + link (use cards-promo)
